testcase.name: test_worker_metrics_endpoint_requires_admin

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 403 for non-admin, got 401 assert 401 == 403 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration101_features.py:47: in test_worker_metrics_endpoint_requires_admin assert response.status_code == 403, f"Expected 403 for non-admin, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 403 for non-admin, got 401 E assert 401 == 403 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_worker_metrics_endpoint_admin_access

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 200 for admin, got 401 assert 401 == 200 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration101_features.py:56: in test_worker_metrics_endpoint_admin_access assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200 for admin, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 for admin, got 401 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_comics_config_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: Comics config failed: 404 assert 404 == 200 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration101_features.py:110: in test_comics_config_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Comics config failed: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Comics config failed: 404 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
